name: elevenlabs_ui_transcript_viewer
description: Deterministic reference for the ElevenLabs Transcript Viewer component — word-by-word highlighting synced to audio playback with play/pause and scrub controls.

TranscriptViewerContainer.description: Root — manages audio and alignment state

audioSrc.description: Source URL of the audio file

audioType.description: MIME type of the audio file

TranscriptViewerWords.description: Word-by-word display with active word highlighting

alignment_data_shape.characterStartTimesSeconds: number[] — start time for each character
alignment_data_shape.characterEndTimesSeconds: number[] — end time for each character

use_cases: TTS output review with aligned transcript
Accessibility — visual text following along with audio
